name: Sensational Beef Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. SLICE BEEF ACROSS GRAIN INTO VERY THIN STRIPS.
2. IN A SKILLET OVER HIGH HEAT, ADD 1 TABLEScoop MARGARINE AND COOK BEEF AND ONION UNTIL BEEF IS NO LONGER PINK.
3. STIR IN CREAM OF CHICKEN SOUP AND PAPRIKA. HEAT THROUGH, STIRRING TO KEEP FROM BURNING.
4. REDUCE HEAT AND ADD SOUR CREAM.
5. SERVE OVER HOT NOODLES.
6. MAKES 6 SERVINGS.
